description.short: Scholarships, events and inbox — personalised for you.
description.full: HKU Campus Agent monitors your inbox, scrapes LinkedIn and Xiaohongshu, and searches all 665 HKU scholarships to surface the right opportunities for you — filtered by your faculty, year, GPA, and interests. It drafts scholarship applications and keeps your inbox clean.

commands.title: Get my digest
commands.description: Show my latest scholarships, events and inbox summary

commands.title: What should I focus on?
commands.description: Proactive briefing with suggested next steps

commands.title: Apply to a scholarship
commands.description: Start a guided application by name

commands.title: Show scholarships
commands.description: Show scholarships I can apply for right now

commands.title: Show events
commands.description: Show competitions and events matching my interests

commands.title: Update my profile
commands.description: Update my GPA, year or interests
